name: AiPrReviewer
description: Create pull requests and post AI-generated review comments on GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket repositories.
author: ad-ai-pr-reviewer

inputs.name: action
inputs.label: Action
inputs.helpMarkDown: Choose what the task should do.

inputs.name: provider
inputs.label: Source Repository Provider
inputs.helpMarkDown: The version control provider hosting the repository.

inputs.name: accessToken
inputs.label: Access Token
inputs.helpMarkDown: Personal Access Token (PAT) with repo/PR read+write permissions. Store this in a secret pipeline variable.

inputs.name: repository
inputs.label: Repository
inputs.helpMarkDown: Repository in `owner/repo` format (e.g. `myorg/myrepo`). For Bitbucket Server, use `PROJECT_KEY/repo-slug`.

inputs.name: serverUrl
inputs.label: Server URL
inputs.helpMarkDown: Required for GitLab self-hosted or Bitbucket Server. Example: `https://gitlab.mycompany.com`. Leave empty for cloud providers.

inputs.name: sourceBranch
inputs.label: Source Branch (head)
inputs.helpMarkDown: The branch containing your changes. Defaults to the current build branch.

inputs.name: targetBranch
inputs.label: Target Branch (base)
inputs.helpMarkDown: The branch you want to merge into.

inputs.name: prTitle
inputs.label: PR Title
inputs.helpMarkDown: Title for the pull request.

inputs.name: prDescription
inputs.label: PR Description
inputs.helpMarkDown: Body text for the pull request. Markdown is supported.

inputs.name: prNumber
inputs.label: Pull Request Number
inputs.helpMarkDown: The PR/MR number to review or comment on.

inputs.name: commentBody
inputs.label: Comment Text
inputs.helpMarkDown: Comment text to post on the PR. Markdown is supported.

inputs.name: failOnExistingPR
inputs.label: Fail if PR already exists
inputs.helpMarkDown: If checked, the task will fail when a PR for the same branches already exists. If unchecked, it outputs the existing PR URL.

inputs.name: enableAiReview
inputs.label: Enable AI Review
inputs.helpMarkDown: Use an AI model to analyze the PR diff and post a structured review comment.

inputs.name: aiProvider
inputs.label: AI Provider
inputs.helpMarkDown: The AI hosting service to use for reviews.

inputs.name: aiApiKey
inputs.label: API Key
inputs.helpMarkDown: API key for the selected AI provider. **Anthropic:** get from [console.anthropic.com](https://console.anthropic.com). **Azure AI Foundry:** your deployment API key. **LiteLLM:** your proxy key (leave empty if your proxy requires no auth). Store as a secret pipeline variable.
inputs.visibleRule: enableAiReview = true && aiProvider != bedrock && aiProvider != vertex

inputs.name: aiBaseUrl
inputs.label: AI Endpoint URL
inputs.helpMarkDown: Base URL of the AI endpoint. **Azure AI Foundry:** `https://<resource>.services.ai.azure.com/models` (find in Azure AI Foundry → Project → Endpoints). **LiteLLM:** your proxy URL, e.g. `http://localhost:4000`.
inputs.visibleRule: enableAiReview = true && aiProvider != anthropic && aiProvider != bedrock && aiProvider != vertex

inputs.name: aiModel
inputs.label: Model
inputs.helpMarkDown: Model identifier to use for review. **Anthropic / Vertex / LiteLLM:** `claude-sonnet-4-6`, `claude-opus-4-6`, `claude-haiku-4-5-20251001`. **AWS Bedrock:** `anthropic.claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022-v2:0`, `us.anthropic.claude-opus-4-5:0` (use cross-region inference prefix for newer models). **Azure AI Foundry:** your deployment name.

inputs.name: aiReviewContext
inputs.label: Review Context
inputs.helpMarkDown: Additional instructions for the AI reviewer (e.g. 'Focus on security issues', 'This is a hotfix, be concise').

inputs.name: aiMaxDiffLines
inputs.label: Max Diff Lines
inputs.helpMarkDown: Truncate the diff sent to the AI if it exceeds this many lines. Prevents token limit issues on large PRs. In per-file mode, this limit is applied per file (divided by 3).

inputs.name: aiReviewMode
inputs.label: Review Mode
inputs.helpMarkDown: **Standard:** single API call with the full diff. **Per-file:** each changed file is reviewed individually, then synthesised into one final assessment. Per-file is more thorough but uses more API calls.

inputs.name: aiMaxFiles
inputs.label: Max Files to Review (per-file mode)
inputs.helpMarkDown: In per-file mode, the maximum number of files reviewed individually. Files beyond this limit are skipped.

inputs.name: awsAccessKeyId
inputs.label: AWS Access Key ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: AWS access key ID for Bedrock authentication. Leave empty to use IAM role or environment credentials (`AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID`). Store as a secret pipeline variable.

inputs.name: awsSecretAccessKey
inputs.label: AWS Secret Access Key
inputs.helpMarkDown: AWS secret access key for Bedrock authentication. Leave empty to use IAM role or environment credentials (`AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY`). Store as a secret pipeline variable.

inputs.name: awsRegion
inputs.label: AWS Region
inputs.helpMarkDown: AWS region where your Bedrock Claude model is enabled (e.g. `us-east-1`, `eu-west-1`). Enable the model in the AWS Bedrock console under Model access.

inputs.name: gcpProjectId
inputs.label: GCP Project ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: Google Cloud project ID where Vertex AI and Claude are enabled. Authentication uses Application Default Credentials (ADC) — set the `GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS` environment variable to your service account key file path.

inputs.name: gcpRegion
inputs.label: GCP Region
inputs.helpMarkDown: Google Cloud region where Claude is available on Vertex AI (e.g. `us-east5`, `europe-west1`). Check [Vertex AI model availability](https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/docs/generative-ai/learn/models) for supported regions.

outputVariables.name: PrUrl
outputVariables.description: The URL of the created or reviewed pull request.

outputVariables.name: PrNumber
outputVariables.description: The number of the created or reviewed pull request.

outputVariables.name: ReviewVerdict
outputVariables.description: AI review verdict: lgtm, needs-work, or critical.

outputVariables.name: ReviewTotalIssues
outputVariables.description: Total number of issues found by the AI review.

outputVariables.name: ReviewSummary
outputVariables.description: One-line summary of the AI review.
